notes: This inventory records current stdlib web/API route posture for Public Alpha Deployment Readiness Review.
Routes with caller-provided local filesystem controls are blocked in public_alpha mode.
Routes marked safe_public_alpha are safe only for the constrained demo posture; this is not production readiness.

routes.notes: Reports mode, configured root kinds, enabled capabilities, and disabled capabilities without private path values.
routes.reason: Status page is read-only and exposes no caller-provided local filesystem controls.

routes.notes: JSON status response must report root kinds only as configured or not_configured.
routes.reason: Status endpoint is read-only and exposes no caller-provided local filesystem controls.

routes.notes: Mode-aware API index; unsafe route entries remain discoverable but policy blocks them in public_alpha.
routes.reason: API index is read-only and carries capability metadata.

routes.notes: Exact-resolution workspace disables local write/export controls in public_alpha mode.
routes.reason: Workspace view uses bounded public boundaries without local path parameters.

routes.notes: Exact-resolution JSON is safe only when store_root is absent.
routes.reason: Exact resolution reads bounded corpus state and does not require local path parameters.

routes.notes: Same handler as /api/resolve; the route policy blocks this parameter in public_alpha.
routes.reason: store_root is a caller-provided local filesystem control.

routes.notes: Rule-based query planning only; no LLM, vector, fuzzy, or ranking behavior.
routes.reason: Query planning is deterministic and read-only.

routes.notes: Rule-based query planning only; no LLM, vector, fuzzy, or ranking behavior.
routes.reason: Query planning is deterministic and read-only.

routes.notes: Uses current deterministic search over the bounded corpus, not local-index, ranking, fuzzy, vector, or semantic retrieval.
routes.reason: Deterministic search is read-only and uses no arbitrary local path parameter.
